# KiteSurfSchool Windkracht-12 Reservation System - Setup Instructions

## Project Overview
Laravel-based reservation system for kite surfing school with Tailwind CSS styling.

## Setup Checklist

- [x] Created project initialization file
- [x] Created Laravel project structure with all directories
- [x] Set up environment configuration (.env files)
- [x] Created database models and migrations (8 tables)
- [x] Configured Tailwind CSS with Vite
- [x] Set up Laravel routes and controllers (5 main controllers)
- [x] Created views with Tailwind styling (18 blade templates)
- [x] Set up authentication with role-based access control
- [x] Created database seeder with test data
- [x] Created comprehensive README documentation

## Development Server
Once setup is complete, run:
```bash
php artisan serve
```

## Key Features to Implement
- Instructor and student management
- Lesson scheduling and reservations
- Weather and wind condition tracking
- Booking confirmation system
- Admin dashboard
- User profiles and authentication
